  • Reference

Package index

Vibration of Effects

Core VoE computation functions

vibration
Vibration of Effects
conductVibration()
Exhaustive Vibration of Effects
conductVibrationSample()
Sampling-Based Vibration of Effects
conductVibrationForK()
Compute VoE for a fixed number of adjustors
run_model()
Fit a model

Summary Statistics

Post-processing and summarization

post_process
Post-processing and summary statistics for VoE results
summary_vibration()
Summarize VoE results
summary_vibration_stratum()
Summarize VoE results by stratum
statPerK()
Summary statistics per k
statPerKandFactor()
Summary statistics per k and factor level
quantilesHR()
Quantiles of hazard ratios
quantilesPvalue()
Quantiles of p-values
quantilesEstimate()
Quantiles of estimates
getContoursForPctile()
Compute contour levels for VoE density plot

Plotting

Visualization of VoE results

plot_vibration
Plotting functions for VoE results
plot_vibration_cox()
Plot VoE for Cox models
find_adjustment_variable()
Identify models containing a specific adjustment variable
